Luigi

Luigi is a fictional character in the Mario video game franchise, created by Nintendo. He is the younger brother of Mario and is often depicted as a taller, more timid character who goes on adventures alongside Mario to rescue Princess Peach from the villain Bowser.

Luigi is known for his green hat, blue overalls, and mustache. He has appeared in numerous games, including the Super Mario series, Mario Kart, and many others. He is one of the most iconic and recognizable video game characters in history.
